special_mechanics.name: Isometric Movement System
special_mechanics.description: Game operates on isometric game engine with varying level terrain. Infantry rendered as sprites; some units and buildings use voxel rendering.

special_mechanics.name: Unit Movement Types
special_mechanics.description: Different unit classes have distinct movement capabilities including hovering vehicles and burrowing units that can emerge behind enemy defenses.

special_mechanics.name: Dynamic Lighting & Day/Night Cycles
special_mechanics.description: Environmental system with dynamic lighting affecting visual representation of movement and positioning.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative data from Wikipedia gameplay description. This is a real-time strategy game (not platformer/action), so traditional character physics parameters (jump, gravity, acceleration) are not applicable. Movement is based on unit pathfinding and strategic positioning rather than real-time physics simulation.
sources_used: wikipedia: Command & Conquer: Tiberian Sun gameplay section
